# Storage

## Storage Array

**Status:** ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue)

**type:** `storage.array`

**Description:** A storage array is a collection of disk drives configured with RAID or other data protection mechanisms to provide reliable storage capacity.

**Attributes:**

| Role | Key | Stability | [Requirement Level](https://opentelemetry.io/docs/specs/semconv/general/attribute-requirement-level/) | Value Type | Description | Example Values |

| Description | [`storage.array.compressed`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | boolean | Specifies whether the array is compressed. | `true`; `false` |
| Description | [`storage.array.encryption`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | boolean | Specifies whether the array is encrypted. | `true`; `false` |
| Description | [`storage.array.name`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | Indicates the name of the storage array. | `array1`; `array_ssd_01`; `capacity_array_A` |
| Description | [`storage.array.raid_level`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | Indicates the RAID level of the array. | `raid0`; `raid1`; `raid5`; `raid6`; `raid10` |
| Description | [`storage.array.status`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | Indicates the status of the storage array. | `online`; `offline`; `degraded` |
| Description | [`storage.pool.id`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | Indicates the pool number of specific pool in the cluster. | `0`; `1` |

**type:** `storage.cluster`

**Status:** ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue)

**type:** `storage.ip_port`

| Description | [`storage.ip_port.status`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | Indicates the status of the specific port. | `active`; `inactive`; `down` |
| Description | [`storage.ip_port.subnet`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | Indicates the IP subnet of the port. | `192.168.1.0/24` |

| Description | [`storage.ip_port.ip_address`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Opt-In` | string | Indicates the Internet Protocol Version 4 (IPv4) address of the port. [1] | `192.168.1.10`; `10.0.0.20` |
| Description | [`storage.ip_port.ip_address_6`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Opt-In` | string | Indicates the Internet Protocol Version 6 (IPv6) address of the port. [2] | `fe80::1`; `2001:db8::3` |

**[1] `storage.ip_port.ip_address`:** IPv4 addresses MUST be specified in dotted-quad notation.

**[2] `storage.ip_port.ip_address_6`:** IPv6 addresses MUST be specified in the RFC 5952 format.

## Storage Node

**Status:** ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue)

**type:** `storage.node`

## Storage Pool

**Status:** ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue)

**type:** `storage.pool`

**Description:** A storage pool is a logical aggregation of storage resources (such as disks or arrays) that provides a unified capacity for volume or filesystem allocation.

| Role | Key | Stability | [Requirement Level](https://opentelemetry.io/docs/specs/semconv/general/attribute-requirement-level/) | Value Type | Description | Example Values |

| Description | [`storage.pool.name`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | The name of the storage pool within the storage system. | `system`; `data`; `ssd_pool`; `capacity_pool` |

## Storage Snapshot

**Status:** ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue)

**type:** `storage.snapshot`

**Description:** A storage snapshot is a point-in-time copy of a volume or filesystem that captures the state of data at a specific moment.

**Attributes:**

| Role | Key | Stability | [Requirement Level](https://opentelemetry.io/docs/specs/semconv/general/attribute-requirement-level/) | Value Type | Description | Example Values |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |

| Description | [`storage.snapshot.creation_time`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | Indicates the creation time of the snapshot in ISO 8601 format. | `2024-01-15T10:30:00Z`; `2024-03-20T14:45:30Z` |
| Description | [`storage.snapshot.expire_time`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | Indicates the expiration time of the snapshot in ISO 8601 format. | `2024-02-15T10:30:00Z`; `2024-04-20T14:45:30Z` |
| Description | [`storage.snapshot.name`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | Indicates the name of the snapshot. | `Prod_snap1`; `backup-2024-01-15` |
| Description | [`storage.snapshot.state`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | Indicates the state of the snapshot. | `active`; `inactive` |
| Description | [`storage.volume.id`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | Indicates the unique identifier of the volume. | `0`; `1` |

## Storage System

**Status:** ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue)

**type:** `storage.system`

**Description:** A storage system is a hardware or software platform that provides data storage capabilities. Examples include block storage systems, file storage systems, object storage systems, software-defined storage platforms etc.

**Attributes:**

| Role | Key | Stability | [Requirement Level](https://opentelemetry.io/docs/specs/semconv/general/attribute-requirement-level/) | Value Type | Description | Example Values |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Identity | [`storage.system.serial_number`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | Indicates the serial number of the storage system. | `75YZ471` |
| Description | [`storage.system.compressed`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | boolean | Indicates if compression is enabled at the storage system level. | `true`; `false` |
| Description | [`storage.system.location`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | The geographical location or building where the storage system is located. | `Bangalore-DC1` |
| Description | [`storage.system.model`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | Indicates the model number of the storage system. | `6H2` |
| Description | [`storage.system.name`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | Indicates the name of the storage system. | `FS9100-5` |
| Description | [`storage.system.protocol`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string[] | Indicates the supported protocols by the storage system. | `["Block", "File", "Object"]` |
| Description | [`storage.system.status`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | Indicates the status of the storage system. | `Normal`; `Error`; `Unreachable` |
| Description | [`storage.system.timezone`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | Indicates the time zone set on the storage system. | `Asia/Hong_Kong` |
| Description | [`storage.system.type`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | Indicates the machine type of the storage system. | `FlashSystem 7200 - 2076` |
| Description | [`storage.system.vendor`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | Indicates the vendor name of the storage system. | `IBM` |
| Description | [`storage.system.version`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | Firmware version of the storage system. | `9.1.0.1 (build 187.27.2508061154000)` |
| Description | [`storage.system.ip_address`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Opt-In` | string | Indicates the Internet Protocol Version 4 (IPv4) address of the storage system. [5] | `192.168.1.100`; `10.0.0.50` |
| Description | [`storage.system.ip_address_6`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Opt-In` | string | Indicates the Internet Protocol Version 6 (IPv6) address of the storage system. [6] | `fe80::abc2:4a28:737a:609e`; `2001:db8::1` |
| Description | [`storage.system.url`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Opt-In` | string | Uniform Resource Locator providing the web address for the storage system management interface. | `https://ibm-flashsystem.example.com`; `https://192.168.1.100:8443`; `https://ess-mgmt.datacenter.com` |

**[5] `storage.system.ip_address`:** IPv4 addresses MUST be specified in dotted-quad notation.

**[6] `storage.system.ip_address_6`:** IPv6 addresses MUST be specified in the RFC 5952 format.

## Storage Tapelibrary

**Status:** ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue)

**type:** `storage.tapelibrary`

**Description:** A tape library is an automated storage system that contains tape drives and tape cartridges for long-term data archival and backup.

**Attributes:**

| Role | Key | Stability | [Requirement Level](https://opentelemetry.io/docs/specs/semconv/general/attribute-requirement-level/) | Value Type | Description | Example Values |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Identity | [`storage.tapelibrary.serial_number`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | Indicates the serial number of the tape library. | `78A2345XYZ`; `TL-SN-123456` |
| Description | [`storage.tapelibrary.location`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | The geographical location or building where the tape library is located. | `Bangalore-DC1`; `Tape-Vault-A` |
| Description | [`storage.tapelibrary.logical_name`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | Indicates the logical name given to the tape library. | `LIB001`; `backup-library-prod` |
| Description | [`storage.tapelibrary.model`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | Indicates the model number of the tape library. | `TS4500`; `Scalar i6`; `StorageTek SL8500` |
| Description | [`storage.tapelibrary.vendor`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | Indicates the vendor name of the tape library. | `IBM`; `Quantum`; `Oracle` |
| Description | [`storage.tapelibrary.version`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | Indicates the firmware version of the tape library. | `3.7.0`; `8.2.1` |

## Storage Volume

**Status:** ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue)

**type:** `storage.volume`

**Description:** A storage volume is a logical unit of storage that is presented to hosts or applications for data storage. Volumes can be thin or thick provisioned.

**Attributes:**

| Role | Key | Stability | [Requirement Level](https://opentelemetry.io/docs/specs/semconv/general/attribute-requirement-level/) | Value Type | Description | Example Values |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Identity | [`storage.volume.id`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | Indicates the unique identifier of the volume. | `0`; `1` |
| Description | [`storage.node.id`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | Indicates the unique identifier of the node in the cluster. | `1`; `2`; `node-0A1B2C3D` |
| Description | [`storage.pool.id`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | Indicates the pool number of specific pool in the cluster. | `0`; `1` |
| Description | [`storage.volume.compressed`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | boolean | Specifies whether the volume is compressed. | `true`; `false` |
| Description | [`storage.volume.encryption`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | boolean | Specifies whether the volume is encrypted. | `true`; `false` |
| Description | [`storage.volume.name`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | Indicates the name of the volume. | `vol_prod_01`; `data_volume`; `backup_lun` |
| Description | [`storage.volume.role`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | Indicates whether the volume is a primary volume or a copy/replica. | `primary`; `copy` |
| Description | [`storage.volume.status`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | Indicates the status of the volume. | `online`; `offline`; `degraded`; `deleting` |
| Description | [`storage.volume.type`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | Indicates the type of the volume. | `striped`; `seq`; `image`; `thin`; `thick` |



---

`storage.volume.role` has the following list of well-known values. If one of them applies, then the respective value MUST be used; otherwise, a custom value MAY be used.

| Value | Description | Stability |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `copy` | The volume is a copy or replica of another volume. | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) |
| `primary` | The volume is a primary volume that serves as the main data source. | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) |

## Storage Volumegroup

**Status:** ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue)

**type:** `storage.volumegroup`

**Description:** A storage volume group is a logical collection of volumes that are managed together for operations such as snapshots or replication.

**Attributes:**

| Role | Key | Stability | [Requirement Level](https://opentelemetry.io/docs/specs/semconv/general/attribute-requirement-level/) | Value Type | Description | Example Values |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Identity | [`storage.volumegroup.id`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | Indicates the unique identifier of the volume group. | `22` |
| Description | [`storage.volumegroup.name`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | Indicates the name of the volume group. | `Prod1`; `app-volume-group` |
| Description | [`storage.volumegroup.status`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | Indicates the status of the volume group. | `online`; `offline`; `degraded` |
